events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Richard Starkey MBE, known professionally as Ringo Starr, was born on July 7, 1940, and turns 86 today.

angles.name: Ringo's big day
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From drumming with The Beatles to his solo career, his rhythm has kept generations moving.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Sir Brian Harold May CBE, born on July 19, 1947, turns 79 today.

angles.name: Rock legend's birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Sir Brian May! His iconic riffs and astronomical talent continue to inspire.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, born on July 26, 1943, turns 83 today.

angles.name: Jagger's enduring energy
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still got the moves! Happy Birthday to the Rolling Stones' incomparable frontman, Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video ever aired.

angles.name: MTV's debut
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed music forever, kicking off with the ironically titled 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it, though?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which quickly became the fastest-selling debut album in British history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe anniversary
angles.copy: Throwback to August 29, 1994, when Oasis dropped their iconic debut 'Definitely Maybe'. A quarter-century on, it still sounds absolutely biblical.

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15–18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for peace, love, and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in cultural history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Aaron Presley, born January 8, 1935, died on August 16, 1977, and would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who left us on this day in 1977. His legacy continues to shake up the world.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Tupac Amaru Shakur, born June 16, 1971, was shot on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas and died six days later on September 13, 1996, at the age of 25.

angles.name: Tupac's legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, a voice that defined a generation, whose life was tragically cut short on this day in 1996. His impact remains undeniable.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: James Marshall 'Jimi' Hendrix, born November 27, 1942, died on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix tribute
angles.copy: On this day in 1970, we lost a true guitar visionary, Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking sound continues to echo through music history.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us the masterpiece that is 'Abbey Road'. That iconic zebra crossing shot is still instantly recognisable.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Christine Ellen Hynde, born on September 7, 1951, turns 75 today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders' frontwoman, still rocking and inspiring with her distinctive style.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: William John Paul Gallagher, born on September 21, 1972, turns 54 today.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that swagger and those anthems to the masses. As you were.

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic solo single 'Imagine' on October 11, 1971, in the US and in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine release anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine' a world of peace. A timeless message that resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple introduced the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, and it began shipping on November 10, 2001.

angles.name: iPod's 25th anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple put '1,000 songs in your pocket' with the first iPod. Remember your first one?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Happy James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007 and his incredible legacy of action, style, and unforgettable theme tunes.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Winston Ono Lennon, born on October 9, 1940, would have been 86 today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to inspire millions.
